name: /pr-source-add prompts operator for the tier when not provided as a command flag
command:
mkdir -p stub/myorg/myrepo .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"name":"myrepo","pushed_at":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z"}
' > stub/myorg/myrepo/repo-metadata.json && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: []
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" myorg/myrepo --gh-clone-stub stub --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --source-class financial-industry --non-interactive 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'tier_required' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
